title: BUbreakingSectionTwo
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingSectionTwo, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: How India Became One of the World’s Biggest Economies
items.description: India has grown rapidly despite its slow industrialization, and its economy is now nearly as big as Japan’s.

items.title: The AI resource reallocation challenge: How can companies capture the value of time?
items.description: The McKinsey Global Institute estimates 57% of U.S. work hours could be automated in the next five years, but how do CEOs realize that "AI Time Divide...

items.title: Intuit’s CFO isn’t flinching at AI. He says it’s fueling the company’s next growth phase
items.description: AI anxiety has hit software stocks, but Intuit’s CFO says the company is leaning into the technology.

items.title: Pentagon Fires Another Laser at a Drone, Prompting a New Air Closure
items.description: After the downing of a Customs and Border Protection drone, the F.A.A. closed the airspace above Fort Hancock, Texas.

items.title: The Plunging Birthrate
items.description: We asked women about their views on having kids.

items.title: With Possible Iran Strike Looming, U.S. Says Staff Can Leave Israel, and Urges Speed
items.description: In an email to embassy workers Friday morning, Ambassador Mike Huckabee warned them that if they wanted to leave Israel, they “should do so TODAY.”

items.title: U.S. stocks are being battered by ‘AI derangement syndrome,’ and CEOs are learning not to talk about it
items.description: Investors have become so skittish of stocks linked to AI that it's dragging down the entire U.S. market.

items.title: Exclusive: Flux, backed by 8VC, raises $37 million to vibe code electronics
items.description: Matthias Wagner’s Flux, built to vibe code electronics, has raised $37 million from 8VC, Bain Capital Ventures, Liquid 2 Ventures, and Outsiders Fund.

items.title: You’ve lost the CEO succession race. Here’s your multi-million dollar bonus
items.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

items.title: Amid Rhetoric About Rupture With U.S., Finland Urges Calm
items.description: “We don’t need a bulldozer,” says Alexander Stubb, Finland’s president and a golf partner of President Trump. “Reform doesn’t mean destruction.”
